teams.name: Security
teams.focus: Attack paths, authority boundaries, secrets, and forbidden automation.

members.focus: Finds attack paths, privilege escalation, and abuse cases.
Checks credentials, tokens, logs, and configuration for leakage risk.
Checks L3/L4, Human Approval, forbidden automation, and risk policy triggers.

teams.name: Compliance
teams.focus: Legal, internal policy, ethics, and approval compliance.

members.focus: Reviews laws, contracts, platform terms, and compliance boundaries.
Checks consistency with project rules, Harness, and approval policy.
Reviews fairness, misleading automation, user harm, and ethical risk.

teams.name: Data Engineering
teams.focus: Data flow reliability, quality, architecture, and recovery.

members.focus: Reviews data flows, sync paths, retries, idempotency, and recovery.
Reviews correctness, completeness, consistency, dirty data, and validation.
Reviews data models, storage boundaries, query patterns, and indexes.

teams.name: DevOps SRE
teams.focus: Deployment pipeline, reliability, automation, and runtime health.

members.focus: Reviews deployment pipelines, environment tiers, release gates, and rollback.
Reviews availability, SLOs, failure recovery, and runtime health.
Reviews automation scripts, IaC, permission boundaries, and repeatability.

teams.name: Frontend
teams.focus: UX flow, frontend performance, compatibility, and accessibility.

members.focus: Reviews user flows, interaction paths, information architecture, and clarity.
Reviews rendering performance, asset weight, first paint, and responsiveness.
Reviews device compatibility, accessibility, and responsive adaptation.

teams.name: AI Feature
teams.focus: Model fit, prompt contract, and human-AI interaction.

members.focus: Reviews model suitability, capability boundaries, cost-quality fit, and fallback.
Reviews prompt structure, input constraints, output format, and schema alignment.
Reviews collaboration paths, explainability, confirmation points, and misuse risk.

teams.name: Scalability Architecture
teams.focus: Capacity, horizontal scaling, resource efficiency, and bottlenecks.

members.focus: Reviews load growth, throughput, latency budgets, and capacity plans.
Reviews horizontal scaling, partitioning, concurrency, and statelessness.
Reviews CPU, memory, storage, API, token cost, waste, and bottlenecks.

teams.name: Chaos Engineering
teams.focus: Fault injection, resilience, blast radius, and recovery behavior.

members.focus: Reviews fault scenarios, dependency exceptions, timeouts, and disconnects.
Reviews recovery, degradation, retries, circuit breakers, and state consistency.
Reviews failure impact scope, isolation, rollback, and stop mechanisms.

teams.name: Platform
teams.focus: Platform architecture, maintainability, infrastructure fit, and upstream boundaries.

members.focus: Reviews platform architecture, system boundaries, and composition.
Reviews module complexity, maintainability, and long-term evolution cost.
Reviews runtime constraints and Hermes, Gateway, and Kanban boundaries.

teams.name: Privacy Ethics
teams.focus: Data privacy, AI ethics, content safety, and user harm.

members.focus: Reviews personal data, minimization, retention, and deletion boundaries.
Reviews bias, transparency, explainability, and misleading output risk.
Reviews moderation, abuse scenarios, user harm, and content risk.

teams.name: OSS Compliance
teams.focus: Open-source licensing, dependency security, SBOM, and provenance.

members.focus: Reviews open-source licenses, copyright, and redistribution constraints.
Reviews vulnerabilities, supply-chain risk, versioning, and source trust.
Reviews SBOM, component provenance, dependency inventory, and audit evidence.

teams.name: Observability
teams.focus: Monitoring, tracing, logging, metrics, and diagnostic actionability.

members.focus: Reviews monitoring coverage, alert thresholds, and on-call actionability.
Reviews tracing, request correlation, and cross-component causal diagnosis.
Reviews log structure, metric standards, retention, audit, and debugging value.

teams.name: Business
teams.focus: Outcome value, cost, acceptance, and product tradeoffs.

members.focus: Checks whether work serves the intended outcome instead of novelty.
Reviews token, API, runtime, time, and maintenance cost.
Checks whether acceptance criteria are judgeable, executable, and deliverable.

teams.name: Documentation
teams.focus: Documentation coverage, accuracy, maintainability, and stale-content risk.

members.focus: Reviews documentation coverage, missing topics, and operator paths.
Reviews factual accuracy and alignment with code, config, and ADRs.
Reviews documentation structure, update cost, and stale-content risk.

teams.name: API Design
teams.focus: API contracts, versioning, security, rate limits, and developer experience.

members.focus: Reviews API contracts, versioning, compatibility, and breaking-change boundaries.
Reviews auth, authorization, security boundaries, rate limits, and abuse protection.
Reviews API usability, error semantics, examples, SDKs, and debugging.

teams.name: I18N L10N
teams.focus: Translation, locale formatting, RTL, and multilingual behavior.

members.focus: Reviews translation coverage, missing strings, and consistency.
Reviews dates, numbers, currency, units, time zones, and locale formats.
Reviews RTL support, text expansion, multilingual layouts, and input boundaries.
